import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Train a classification model"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/classification/{name}/train"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Trains a specific classification model.
    The name must exist in the classification models. Returns a success message or an error if the name is invalid.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

  parameters={[{"name":"name","in":"path","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string","title":"Name"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
